data.title: Sun Pharma launches UNLOXCYT™ for advanced cutaneous squamous cell carcinoma in the US, for adults not eligible for surgery or radiation.
data.description: A groundbreaking treatment known as UNLOXCYT has been introduced in the United States to help adults with metastatic cutaneous squamous cell carcinoma (mCSCC) or locally advanced CSCC (laCSCC) who are ineligible for curative surgery or curative radiation. UNLOXCYT presents a new approach in checkpoint inhibition, providing hope for individuals facing these advanced stages of CSCC.

data.title: US core CPI inflation remained at 2.6% in December, boosting S&P 500 futures and increasing odds of a Federal Reserve rate cut.
data.description: In December, core CPI inflation remained steady at a modest 2.6%, defying expectations. This led to an increase in S&P 500 futures and raised the likelihood of a Federal Reserve rate cut. The data was described as 'Goldilocks,' indicating a favorable balance for the economy.

TRUMP TO LOWER TARIFFS TO 15% ON GOODS FROM TAIWAN

data.title: AGCO (NYSE: AGCO) declares quarterly dividend of $0.29 per share, announces on Jan. 15, 2026.
data.description: AGCO, a pioneer in agricultural machinery and precision ag technology worldwide, based in Duluth, Ga., disclosed on Jan. 15, 2026, that its Board of Directors has approved a routine quarterly dividend of $0.29 per common share for shareholders of record as of the specified date. This marks AGCO’s ongoing commitment to delivering value to its investors through consistent dividend payouts. Its NYSE ticker symbol is AGCO.

data.title: Allergy & Asthma Network launches PALI program to empower patients in healthcare policy - Jan. 15, 2026.
data.description: A new initiative called the Patient Advocacy Leadership Initiative (PALI) has been introduced by Allergy & Asthma Network. Set to begin on January 15, 2026, in Fairfax, Virginia, the program aims to empower patients and caregivers to impact healthcare policies and bring about substantial changes. PALI is a diverse program meant to engage individuals in advocating for healthcare improvements.

data.title: Cascade Internal Medicine Specialists in Bend, Oregon partners with Concierge Choice Physicians for tailored healthcare services.
data.description: A primary care facility located in Bend, Oregon is providing a distinct and individualized healthcare experience, offering increased time, convenience, and fostering a stronger doctor-patient bond. This program by Concierge Choice Physicians (CCP) in Rockville Centre, N.Y., launched on January 15, 2026, stands out for its unique approach aimed at providing enhanced healthcare services to patients.

data.title: StoneEagle® unveils new Pencilwrench Repair Story Experience at NADA 2026, transforming documentation for technicians amidst growing vehicle complexity. From Richardson, Texas, Jan. 15, 2026.
data.description: Pencilwrench is taking a new approach with Flex Story, transforming how technicians record repair details due to the increasing intricacy of modern vehicle diagnostic processes. The initiative, unveiled in Richardson, Texas on January 15, 2026, showcases a shift in strategy by StoneEagle, a prominent provider of cutting-edge F&I solutions in the automotive sector. This evolution is driven by the need to adapt to the rising complexity of contemporary vehicle diagnostics, reflecting a commitment to enhancing efficiency and accuracy in repair documentation.

data.title: Signing Day Sports offers tech and services for college basketball recruitment, holding first combine with NBA star Thurl Bailey.
data.description: Thurl Bailey, a former NBA star, recently hosted the inaugural combine event. The event marked the first collaboration between Bailey and the hosting organization. It aimed to provide aspiring athletes with an opportunity to showcase their skills and potential. Approximately 100 participants attended the combine, including young talents looking to make a mark in the sports industry. Bailey expressed his excitement about the event and emphasized the importance of such platforms in nurturing talent. Despite being the first of its kind, the combine garnered significant attention and positive feedback from attendees. The event's success has encouraged the organizers and Bailey to consider making it a regular occurrence in the future, with plans to expand and enhance the experience for participants.

data.title: Teledyne VP to hold virtual investor meetings at Needham Growth Conference on Jan 16th. Website has latest presentation.
data.description: Teledyne Technologies Incorporated (NYSE:TDY) based in Thousand Oaks, California, has disclosed that Jason VanWees, Vice Chairman, will conduct virtual investor meetings at the 28th Annual Needham Growth Conference on January 16. Teledyne, a key player in advanced digital imaging products and software, offers its latest investor presentation on its website at www.teledyne.com/investors/events-and-presentations. This move aims to engage stakeholders and showcase the company's innovative technologies and solutions.

data.title: Portal Atlanta at Science Square grows to 32 member companies in 15 months, adds 7 new in January 2026 - signaling rapid growth around Atlanta's life sciences and medtech community.
data.description: In Atlanta, Portal Innovations shared news of ongoing expansion at Portal Atlanta located at Science Square. The addition of seven new member companies brings the total number of organizations served to 32 within the biotech, medtech, digital health, and cleantech sectors. This growth has been achieved in just 15 months since the launch of the ecosystem. Notably, in January 2026 alone, seven new members joined, underscoring the swift momentum surrounding Science Square and the flourishing life sciences and medtech community in Atlanta.
Signing Day Sports discloses Q2 2025 financials, offers a business update, no source mentioned.

data.title: Community Autism Services opens new Autism Learning Center in Dartmouth, MA on Jan. 15, 2026, offering care for children with ASD.
data.description: In Dartmouth, Massachusetts, on January 15, 2026, Community Autism Services revealed the opening of a new autism learning facility. This center in Dartmouth, MA aims to offer top-notch care for children diagnosed with Autism Spectrum Disorder (ASD). The center is situated at 5...

data.title: ROI Rocket and Qualtrics collaborate to enhance B2B research with synthetic data. Partnership aims at faster and scalable data collection.
data.description: ROI Rocket has chosen Qualtrics Edge Audiences as its partner for synthetic panels, while Qualtrics has selected ROI Rocket as the B2B data provider for Edge Audiences' Synthetic AI model. This decision was made by ROI Rocket, a prominent player in B2B panel data quality, on January 15, 2026 in Denver. This partnership signifies a significant step in enhancing the quality of data collected.

data.title: Nurse Practitioners named No. 1 job in America for the third consecutive year by U.S. News & World Report.
data.description: In Austin, Texas, on January 15, 2026, the American Association of Nurse Practitioners® (AANP) has revealed that the nurse practitioner (NP) profession has maintained its position as the number one job in America according to U.S. News & World Report's 2026 Best Jobs rankings. This ranking solidifies the NP profession as highly sought after, highlighting its significance in the current job market landscape.

data.title: Governor Mills reverses online gambling veto in Maine, prioritizing profits over people per Campaign For Fairer Gambling.
data.description: Governor Janet Mills of Maine, who appears disconnected from her constituents, has surprisingly decided against vetoing a bill to legalize online slots and casino games. This comes after the state has already allowed online sports betting. The reversal in her decision puts profits over the well-being of the people. The news was revealed on January 15, 2026, from Augusta, Maine.

data.title: Signing Day Sports hosted the 2025 Military Appreciation Bowl National Combine at The Star in Frisco, Texas, from December 18-21.
data.description: In Scottsdale, Arizona, on January 15, 2026, Signing Day Sports, Inc. (NYSE American: SGN) disclosed the wrap-up of the 2025 Military Appreciation Bowl National Combine. The event took place from December 18 to 21 at The Star in Frisco, Texas, home to the Dallas Cowboys. The Company, known for their Signing Day Sports app and platform aimed at enhancing the recruitment process for high school athletes and college coaches, organized the successful event.

data.title: Signing Day Sports updates transaction with BlockchAIn Digital Infrastructure, expected to close by Feb/Mar 2026.
data.description: The completion of the transaction is progressing well, and it is expected to close either in February or March of 2026. The parties involved are working diligently towards finalizing the deal within the specified timeframe. This update indicates that the transaction is on track to be completed within the next few months.

data.title: ITG integrates Adobe Firefly Services into Storyteq CMP platform, enhancing AI capabilities.
data.description: On January 15, 2026, a strategic partnership was revealed between Inspired Thinking Group (ITG) and Adobe Firefly. ITG declared its plan to incorporate Firefly's generative AI features into its Storyteq CMP content marketing platform, thereby enhancing its AI capabilities. This move aims to provide users with a seamless and improved experience.

data.title: UK's AR7 for CfD Allocation Round results reveal higher wind prices show value of firm, flexible generation in clean electricity buildout.
data.description: In London, the UK's most recent Contracts for Difference (CfD) Allocation Round, known as Round 7 (AR7), results were released by the Department for Energy Security and Net Zero (DESNZ) on January 14, 2026. These results signify a significant advancement in expanding clean electricity infrastructure. The data underlines a crucial realization regarding power system economics: amid the expansion of wind and solar energy, there is amplified value in flexible, dispatchable capacity. When executed effectively, this approach proves to be more cost-effective for consumers compared to other alternatives.
